name: Nigbas Nigde Beton Sanayi Ve Ticaret A.S.
summary: Nigbas Nigde Beton Sanayi Ve Ticaret A.S. manufactures and sells prefabricated concrete products and reinforced concrete structures in Turkey. It offers prefabricated building systems, including general service buildings, facilities for industrial and agricultural purposes, education and sports facilities, and precast infrastructure elements; and concrete electrification poles, such as mains, lightings, electricity transmission lines, and railway catenary poles. The company also provides construction materials, which include cement based building chemicals and ready-mixed concrete; and landscaping elements, such as concrete kerb units, concrete paving stones, concrete fence poles, and concrete flowerbeds. Nigbas Nigde Beton Sanayi Ve Ticaret A.S. was founded in 1969 and is based in Nigde, Turkey.
